title: Approve the second trailer cut
detail: The edit is waiting on producer sign-off — every day of delay compresses the pre-release window.

title: Confirm poster drop date with the distributor
detail: Poster reveal is tentatively Friday; the street team needs 48 hours to prepare.

title: Reply to The Hindu interview request
detail: Feature slot for the release week — respond before Thursday to hold it.

title: Upload colour-graded stills to the Asset Vault
detail: Press outlets are reusing low-res workprint frames.
